Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Let's start off with ship-based ASW tactics. The surface escort ships of the JMSDF are particularly suited for ASW, with sensitive sonar sets and a focus on ASW weaponry.

Go ahead and select the JDS Hiei, the lead ship of the surface escort formation. You can click on the ship through Tactical Display or Formation Manager. Note: remember that if you click on our second ship, JDS Kikuzuki, you can quickly get back to JDS Hiei (the formation leader) by clicking the Middle Mouse Button (MMB).
For the duration of this tutorial, leave your ships at EMCON with all sensors disabled unless otherwise directed.
